hero.title: Find your ideal roommate
hero.subtitle: Don't look for 'people', look for compatibility. Our cohabitation test connects you with people who truly fit with you.

features.title: Why Convinder?
features.subtitle: More than a flat portal. An intelligent compatibility system.

compatibility.title: Real compatibility test
compatibility.description: Our test analyzes habits, schedules and lifestyle to find genuine matches.

explanation.title: Explainable matching
explanation.description: You'll know exactly why you match and what friction points may arise.

contract.title: Living agreements
contract.description: Automatically generate a social contract with clear rules from the start.

security.title: Trust and security
security.description: User verification, reputation system and integrated anti-scam.

step1.title: Create your profile
step1.description: Tell us about yourself, your budget and preferred areas.

step2.title: Take the test
step2.description: 3 minutes to understand your living style.

step3.title: Discover matches
step3.description: Explore compatible profiles with score and clear reasons.

step4.title: Connect
step4.description: Chat, meet and find your ideal flat.

cta.title: Ready to find your ideal roommate?
cta.subtitle: Sharing a flat without a test is like getting married by lottery. Take the test and save yourself the drama.

signup.title: Join Convinder
signup.subtitle: Create your account and find your ideal roommate
signup.name: Name

test.title: Cohabitation Test
test.subtitle: Answer honestly. This helps us find your perfect match.
test.tip: Answer how you LIVE, not how you'd like to live.

dealbreakers.title: Dealbreakers
dealbreakers.subtitle: These are things we do NOT negotiate
